home.heroSubtitle: Ihahiro iguhuza n'abahinzi n'abacuruzi bari hafi yawe. Umusaruro mushya, wizewe, ukugeraho byoroshye.
home.heroSearchHelp: Koresha ibisanduku byombi kugira ngo ubone ibyegereye vuba no kuri internet itihuta.
home.featuredSubtitle: Hitamo mu byo ku isoko — byiza, bishya, hafi yawe.
home.featuredError: Ntitwabashije kuzana ibiri ku isoko ubu. Ongera ugerageze.
home.howSubtitle: Intambwe eshatu zo gukora ubucuruzi bwizewe
home.step1Body: Shyiraho amafoto, ingano, n'igiciro mu minota mike.
home.step2Body: Shakisha kuri telefone cyangwa mudasobwa yawe.
home.step3Body: Hamagara cyangwa wandikire, maze mwumvikane uko umusaruro utangwa.
home.farmerBody: Bona abaguzi benshi, garagaza ubwiza, kandi ukomeze kugenzura igiciro.
home.buyerBody: Shaka ibicuruzwa biri hafi, gereranya, uvugane n'abatanga vuba.
home.buyersSectionBody: Gereranya igiciro, ingano n'aho umusaruro uri mbere yo guhamagara kugira ngo urugendo n'amafaranga bikoreshwe neza.
home.buyersPointTwo: Shakisha mu turere twegereye mbere yo gutegura kohereza.
home.buyersPointThree: Vugana n'umugurisha kuri telefoni, WhatsApp cyangwa ubutumwa.
home.sellersSectionBody: Shyira umusaruro wawe ku rubuga mu buryo busobanutse, ugerweho n'abaguzi benshi kandi uvugane nabo mu buryo bworoshye.
home.sellersPointOne: Garagaza umusaruro wawe ku makarita asobanutse kandi yoroshye gusoma.
home.sellersPointTwo: Gerwaho n'abaguzi bashakisha umusaruro cyangwa ahantu mu Rwanda.
home.sellersPointThree: Koresha konti imwe ku buguzi no ku bugurisha uko urubuga rugenda rwaguka.
home.trustSectionTitle: Ryubakiye ku nzira z'ubucuruzi zikoreshwa mu Rwanda
home.trustSectionBody: Ihahiro yoroshya gushakisha, kugereranya no kuvugana n'umugurisha kugira ngo abaguzi n'abahinzi bakoreshe telefone byihuse.
home.trustPanelTitle: Gushakisha ku rwego rw'akarere ku bucuruzi bwa buri munsi
home.trustStatListings: Amatangazo yagaragajwe kandi yiteguye data za backend
home.trustStatDistricts: Aho gushakira hateguwe hashingiye ku turere
home.trustSearchBody: Tangira ku hantu umenyereye nka Kigali, Musanze, Huye cyangwa Rubavu maze ugabanye urwego rw'ishakisha.
home.trustContactBody: Umaze kubona itangazo rikubereye, hamagara cyangwa wandikire umugurisha udaciye mu zindi ntambwe.
home.trustBandwidthBody: Amakarita yoroheje, amafoto atinda kugaragara no ku mpapuro zoroshye bituma ikora neza no kuri telefone ziciriritse.
home.trustSafetyBody: Frontend yubatswe ku makuru asobanutse, ibiciro biboneka neza n'ubushobozi bwo kongeramo moderation uko backend igenda ikura.
home.whyNearbyBody: Shakisha ibicuruzwa biri hafi y'aho uri hose mu gihugu.
home.whyConnectBody: Uvugana n'umuhinzi cyangwa umuguzi mu minota mike, utagombye gukora urugendo.
home.whyPricesBody: Gereranya amakuru ku isoko kugira ngo uhitemo neza.
home.whyFarmersBody: Gura ku baturanyi kandi ufashe ubuhinzi bw'iwacu gukomeza.
home.bottomCtaBody: Iyandikishe cyangwa winjire ubone ibiryo bishya bivuye mu maboko y'abahinzi bacu.

listingDetail.dailyUse: Wawukoresha mu mafunguro ya buri munsi.

postHarvest.subtitle: Sangiza umusaruro wawe ku isoko maze uhuze n'abaguzi bari hafi yawe.
postHarvest.descriptionPlaceholder: Sobanura umusaruro wawe (ubwoko, ubwiza, uko watangwa...)
postHarvest.photosHelp: Ongeraho amafoto meza agaragaza umusaruro wawe (ntarenze 6)
postHarvest.uploadBody: PNG, JPG, JPEG (ntarenga 5MB kuri buri foto)
postHarvest.tipPhoto: Koresha amafoto agaragara neza kandi agaragaza umusaruro nyawo.
postHarvest.helpBody: Niba ufite ikibazo cyangwa ukeneye ubufasha, twandikire cyangwa uhamagare.
postHarvest.loginModalTitle: Banza winjire mbere yo gushyiraho umusaruro
postHarvest.loginModalBody: Mbere yo gutangaza umusaruro wawe, ugomba kubanza kwinjira. Ushaka gukomeza ujye ku rupapuro rwo kwinjira?
postHarvest.newProductModalBody: Andika izina ry'ikopiya cyawe muri iyi nzungu
postHarvest.loginRequired: Banza winjire mbere yo gushyiraho umusaruro.
postHarvest.requiredFieldsError: Banza wuzuze ibisabwa byose mbere yo kohereza itangazo.
postHarvest.photoTypeError: Hemewe amafoto ya PNG na JPG gusa.
postHarvest.submitError: Ntitwabashije kohereza umusaruro wawe ubu. Ongera ugerageze.
postHarvest.securityBody: Amakuru yawe n'ay'umusaruro wawe arinzwe. Ntituyasangiza abandi nta burenganzira.

howPage.intro: Ihahiro ihuza abahinzi n'abaguzi mu buryo bworoshye, bwihuse kandi bwizewe.
howPage.stepsTitle: Uko Ihahiro ikora mu ntambwe 4 zoroshye
howPage.step1Body: Umuhinzi yongeraho umusaruro afite agashyiraho amakuru n'amafoto.
howPage.step2Body: Abaguzi bashakisha umusaruro hafi yabo cyangwa ahandi hose.
howPage.step3Body: Mutangira kuganira mukoresheje telefone cyangwa WhatsApp.
howPage.step4Body: Mwumvikana aho muhurira, uko mutanga umusaruro, n'uko mwishyura.
howPage.benefitFastBody: Shakisha, ubone, kandi uvugane n'uwo mukorana mu buryo bworoshye.
howPage.benefitNearbyBody: Bona umusaruro uri hafi yawe ugabanye amafaranga y'ingendo.
howPage.benefitInfoBody: Abaguzi n'abahinzi bahana amakuru afasha ubucuruzi kuba bwizewe.
howPage.benefitTrustBody: Amakuru y'ingenzi arindwa, kandi serivisi yubakiye ku cyizere.
howPage.farmersBody: Shyira umusaruro wawe ku isoko, ugere ku baguzi benshi, kandi ugurishe neza.
howPage.buyersBody: Shakisha umusaruro mwiza, gereranya ibiciro, maze uvugane n'abahinzi byihuse.
howPage.ctaBody: Tangira gukoresha Ihahiro uyu munsi ubone cyangwa ucuruze umusaruro wawe.

aboutPage.intro1: Ihahiro ni urubuga rwubatswe mu Rwanda rugamije guhuza abahinzi n'abaguzi hifashishijwe ikoranabuhanga rigezweho.
aboutPage.intro2: Intego yacu ni ukongera agaciro ku buhinzi, gufasha abahinzi kubona isoko rihamye, no guteza imbere ubucuruzi burambye.
aboutPage.goalConnectBody: Guhuza abahinzi n'abaguzi mu buryo bworoshye.
aboutPage.goalValueBody: Guteza imbere ubuhinzi no kongera agaciro ku musaruro.
aboutPage.goalSustainableBody: Gutanga isoko rihamye, ryizewe kandi rirambye.
aboutPage.approachTechBody: Dukoresha ikoranabuhanga ryoroshye kugerwaho na bose.
aboutPage.approachMarketBody: Dutanga amakuru afasha abahinzi n'abaguzi gufata ibyemezo byiza.
aboutPage.approachPartnersBody: Dukorana n'inzego zitandukanye kugira ngo duteze imbere ubuhinzi.
aboutPage.approachSafetyBody: Dutanga serivisi zizewe kandi turinda amakuru y'abakoresha bose.
aboutPage.teamBody: Dufite ikipe y'inzobere mu ikoranabuhanga, ubuhinzi, imari, n'iterambere ry'abaturage ikora buri munsi kugira ngo Ihahiro ibere bose igisubizo cyiza.

benefits.buyerSpeedBody: Gereranya umusaruro, ingano n'aho uherereye mbere yo guhamagara umugurisha.
benefits.sellerReachBody: Tuma umusaruro wawe ugaragara neza kuri internet kugira ngo abaguzi benshi bawubone.
benefits.lightweightBody: Amafishi yoroshye n'impapuro zoroheje bituma porogaramu ikoreshwa neza kuri telefone.

roles.buyerBody: Shakisha umusaruro, gereranya amatangazo, ubike ibyo ushaka kandi uvugane n'abagurisha vuba.
roles.sellerBody: Shyiraho umusaruro, subiza abakwifuza kandi ukurikirane ibikorwa by'itangazo ryawe.

validation.identifierInvalid: Andika email cyangwa nimero ya telefoni iboneye

login.title: Injira kugira ngo ukomeze ubucuruzi bwawe
login.subtitle: Genzura amatangazo, ibiganiro n'ibyo wabitse kuri konti imwe yoroheje.
login.submitError: Ntitwabashije kukwinjiza ubu. Reba amakuru wanditse wongere ugerageze.
login.sideBody: Waba ugura cyangwa ugurisha umusaruro, konti yawe ituma isoko ryoroha, ryihuta kandi ryiteguye guhuza neza na backend.

register.title: Injira muri Ihahiro nk'umuguzi, umugurisha cyangwa byombi
register.subtitle: Tangiza konti imwe ubu kugira ngo ibe yiteguye amatangazo, ubushakashatsi wabitse, ubusabe bwo gutwara n'ibiganiro.
register.privacyNote: Amakuru yawe abikwa kugira ngo konti yawe ibe yiteguye kwinjira neza no ku mikorere izakurikira nka searches zibitswe, chats n'ubusabe bwo gutwara.
register.submitError: Ntitwabashije gukora konti yawe ubu. Reba amakuru wongere ugerageze.
register.sideTitle: Tangira ufite umwirondoro usobanutse ku isoko
register.sideBody: Ihahiro yagenewe abantu bashobora kugura, kugurisha cyangwa gukora byombi. Hitamo uruhare rukubereye uyu munsi, ubundi UI izabe yiteguye izindi mikorere.

footer.mission: Guhuza abahinzi n'abaguzi mu Rwanda n'isoko ryizewe.
footer.rights: © {year} Ihahiro Modern Agrimarket. Uburenganzira bwose burabitswe.

stub.body: Ibirimo byuzuye bizashyirwa mu isohoka rikurikira.

meta.homeDescription: Shaka cyangwa ugurishe umusaruro mu Rwanda.
meta.loginDescription: Injira kugira ngo ugenzure amatangazo, ibiganiro n'ibikorwa byawe ku isoko rya Ihahiro.
meta.registerDescription: Hanga konti yawe ya Ihahiro kugira ngo ugure, ugurishe kandi ugenzure ibikorwa byo ku isoko.
